green_thumb.title: Green Thumb
green_thumb.description: +10% crop yield. Your touch coaxes life from the soil.

soil_sense.title: Soil Sense
soil_sense.description: +15% soil quality bonus. You read the earth like a book.

seed_saver.title: Seed Saver
seed_saver.description: +20% seed return on harvest. Nothing goes to waste.

master_brewer.title: Master Brewer
master_brewer.description: +25% potion and brew quality. Your concoctions are legendary.

livestock_tender.title: Livestock Tender
livestock_tender.description: +15% animal drops. Your animals thrive under your care.

verdant_touch.title: Verdant Touch
verdant_touch.description: Bone meal effect radius doubled. Life erupts at your command.

harvest_moon.title: Harvest Moon
harvest_moon.description: +30% farming effectiveness at night. The moon empowers your harvest.

natures_bounty.title: Nature's Bounty
natures_bounty.description: +40% crop yield at night. Moonlit harvests overflow with abundance.

colony_architect.title: Colony Architect
colony_architect.description: +25% MineColonies worker speed. Your colony operates at peak efficiency.

verdant_sovereign.title: Verdant Sovereign
verdant_sovereign.description: All farming stats +10%. Nature itself bows to your mastery.
